payload.content: Follow this procedure: (1) list every named entity in the claim; (2) mark each as 'resolved' (grounded by a hop-1 title) or 'unresolved'; (3) write the hop-2 query targeting exactly one unresolved entity, using its exact name from the claim.

rationale: Procedure-shaped feature for staged-reasoning. Tests whether explicit three-step decomposition (list → mark → query) outperforms single-shot query writing on multi-entity claims.
